note: golden_hash is empty until first golden-parity.test.mjs --update. Vector 1: QM points-and-fees 2026 table. Vector 2: HOEPA 2026 table.

vectors.name: qm_points_fees_2026
vectors.description: QM points-and-fees tier table for 2026 (FR 2025-22773). Version-pinned reference for agents.

output_payload.note: This node exists because agents hallucinate current-year dollar thresholds. Values are pinned at build time; refresh yearly. Always verify at consumerfinance.gov for the latest effective rule.

vectors.name: hoepa_2026
vectors.description: HOEPA high-cost mortgage threshold table for 2026. Rate spread: 6.5 pp first-lien, 8.5 pp sub-lien. Points-and-fees: 5% or $1,380.

output_payload.note: This node exists because agents hallucinate current-year dollar thresholds. Values are pinned at build time; refresh yearly. Always verify at consumerfinance.gov for the latest effective rule.
